evals.prompt:
Build me a stock research platform called 'InvestSmart' using the FAST template on AgentCore. Here's what I need:

Backend: A Strands agent that can fetch real-time stock data (prices, volume, market cap) from a financial API like Alpha Vantage or Yahoo Finance via a Lambda gateway tool. The agent should also have a tool that pulls recent news headlines for a given ticker from a news API. It needs to be able to analyze the data and provide buy/hold/sell recommendations with reasoning.

Frontend: A stock search page where users type a ticker symbol and get a detailed analysis card with price chart, key metrics, recent news, and the agent's recommendation. Also need a watchlist page where users can save tickers they're tracking. Use Cognito for auth, single user group.

Make it look like Bloomberg Terminal meets a modern SaaS product — dark theme, data-dense but clean. Deploy the whole thing.
evals.expected_output: PLAN.md with architecture for stock research app. Strands agent with financial data fetching tools (stock prices + news). React frontend with stock search, analysis cards with charts, watchlist page. Dark premium theme following taste-skill principles. CDK deployment with DynamoDB for watchlist persistence.
expectations: Creates a PLAN.md before writing code
Clones the FAST template from GitHub
Creates a Strands agent with a system prompt tailored for stock analysis
Creates a gateway Lambda tool for fetching stock price/volume data
Creates a gateway Lambda tool for fetching news headlines by ticker
Frontend has a stock search page with ticker input
Frontend displays analysis results with price charts (Recharts or similar)
Frontend has a watchlist page with saved tickers
Frontend uses a dark color scheme (not default light shadcn)
Frontend follows taste-skill anti-slop rules (no generic placeholder data, no Inter font)
DynamoDB table configured for persisting user watchlists
Writes unit tests for the stock data fetching tools
Writes integration tests for the agent analysis flow
Attempts CDK deployment

evals.prompt:
I want a portfolio management app on AgentCore using the FAST template. Call it 'PortfolioIQ'.

The agent needs these capabilities:
1. A tool that connects to a DynamoDB table storing user portfolio holdings (ticker, shares, avg cost basis, purchase date)
2. A Code Interpreter tool to run Python calculations — portfolio performance metrics (total return, annualized return, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown), correlation analysis between holdings, and sector allocation breakdown
3. A tool that fetches current market prices so the agent can calculate unrealized P&L

Frontend pages:
- Portfolio overview: shows all holdings in a bento-grid layout with individual position cards showing P&L, weight, and a mini sparkline chart
- Performance page: time-series chart of portfolio value, key metrics displayed in a clean dashboard
- Rebalance page: user sets target allocations, agent recommends trades to rebalance
- Add/edit holdings modal

Cognito auth with a single user pool. I want the UI to feel like a premium fintech product — think Wealthfront or Robinhood's cleaner moments, not a Bootstrap dashboard.
evals.expected_output: Full portfolio management app with Strands agent that has DynamoDB CRUD, market data fetching, and Code Interpreter for financial calculations. Premium fintech-style React frontend with portfolio overview, performance charts, rebalancing recommendations.
expectations: Creates a PLAN.md documenting architecture and data models
Clones the FAST template
Creates a Strands agent with system prompt for portfolio management
Creates DynamoDB tool for portfolio holdings CRUD
Leverages Code Interpreter for financial calculations (Sharpe ratio, returns, etc.)
Creates a market price fetching tool
Frontend portfolio overview uses bento-grid or asymmetric layout (not equal cards)
Frontend performance page has time-series charts
Frontend rebalance page shows agent trade recommendations
Frontend uses Framer Motion for transitions and micro-interactions
Frontend avoids Inter font and uses a taste-skill approved typeface
CDK stack includes DynamoDB table for holdings
Writes unit tests for portfolio calculation tools
Writes integration tests for the CRUD + analysis flow

evals.prompt:
Build a stock research report generator on FAST/AgentCore. Call it 'DeepDive'.

The agent should:
- Fetch fundamental data for a stock (P/E ratio, revenue growth, EPS, debt-to-equity) via a financial data API tool
- Fetch technical indicators (RSI, MACD, moving averages) via another tool
- Run sentiment analysis on recent news using Code Interpreter with Python (nltk or textblob)
- Generate a comprehensive research report combining all three analyses

Frontend:
- A search/input page where users enter a ticker and select analysis depth (quick scan vs. deep dive)
- A report viewer page that renders the agent's research report with sections for fundamentals, technicals, and sentiment — each section should have data visualizations (gauge charts for sentiment, candlestick or line charts for technicals, bar charts for financial metrics)
- A report history page showing past reports with filters by ticker, date, and recommendation
- An export button to download the report as PDF

Single Cognito user pool. The frontend should look like a premium Bloomberg-style research terminal but with a modern, clean aesthetic. Not the cluttered 90s Bloomberg look — more like if Apple designed a research terminal.
evals.expected_output: Research report generator with Strands agent combining fundamental analysis, technical indicators, and sentiment analysis tools. React frontend with report viewer featuring multiple chart types, history with filters, and PDF export. Premium modern terminal aesthetic.
expectations: Creates a PLAN.md before building
Clones the FAST template
Creates a Strands agent with system prompt for equity research
Creates a fundamental data fetching tool (P/E, revenue, EPS, etc.)
Creates a technical indicators tool (RSI, MACD, moving averages)
Leverages Code Interpreter for sentiment analysis with Python
Frontend search page has ticker input with analysis depth selection
Frontend report viewer has distinct sections for fundamentals, technicals, sentiment
Frontend includes data visualizations (charts/gauges) in the report
Frontend report history page has filtering capability
Frontend has PDF export functionality
Frontend uses asymmetric layouts and customized shadcn/ui (not defaults)
Frontend uses spring physics animations (Framer Motion)
Writes unit tests for fundamental and technical data tools
Writes integration tests for the full report generation flow
